name: RNode Firmware (nRF52)
label: RNode Firmware (nRF52840) — Reticulum LoRa transport
description: markqvist/RNode_Firmware for nRF52840 LoRa boards (RAK4631, T-Echo, Heltec T114). Reticulum (RNS) LoRa transport; no attack/jammer payload, but a user-tunable TX radio — authorized/licensed use only. CC flashes the vendor DFU package via Nordic Secure DFU over serial.
note: The per-board .zip is a Nordic legacy DFU 0.5 package (manifest.json + .dat + .bin) passed WHOLE as the DFU -pkg (no member extraction), matching CC's chameleon-style nrf_dfu path. Board must be in serial DFU mode (double-tap reset, Adafruit-nRF52 bootloader) before flashing. adafruit-nrfutil (or legacy nrfutil 6.x) must be on PATH. VERIFY on real HW: nrf_dfu_flow_control (0 vs 1) + that adafruit-nrfutil completes the write — nrf_dfu is bench-gated with ZERO prior HW-validated consumers. Same rnodeconf-provisioning caveat as the ESP32 family: flash != signed/provisioned RNode. Zip SHA-256 known from the API but kept verify: until a real DFU flash.
